description: Colossal beings who shaped the world in an elder age, still ruling by the Ordning's strict hierarchy.
subraces: Dim-witted gluttons measuring status by girth and hoarding stolen livestock.
Reclusive cave-artists seeing the surface world as an unsettling dream.
Viking-like raiders sailing icy seas and testing their worth through combat and plunder.
Masterful smiths forging weapons in volcanic strongholds and enslaving lesser races.
Aristocratic sky-dwellers reclining in floating castles and hoarding treasure and secrets alike.
Prophetic titans dwelling in ocean trenches or mountain peaks, closest to the gods.
One-eyed loners relying on brute strength and primitive instinct over civilized craft.
Two-headed brutes whose twin minds bicker endlessly yet fight with terrifying coordination.
Godlike paragons of giantkind whose power rivals the divine and reshapes the land.
